title: platform turns economy plus S0 scripts
purpose: B3.4 defines platform turns economy plus s0 scripts for the agent-driven expert system. Cognition & routing — [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)–S4, conductor, workers, dual-stack.
scope: Owns `B3.4` only; siblings under `B3` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §4 — Branch B — Cognition & routing plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#4-branch-b-cognition-routing-plane).
behavior_steps: On scheduled platform turns per [SEC-13](SEC-13-pursuit-flow.md) interleaving, the conductor runs S0 scripts first—queue peek, promotion apply, staleness reconcile, manifest validation—before any economy worker interprets platform debt.

Economy platform workers from `model-policy.json` execute [B2.6](B2.6-platform-worker-promotion-queue-parallel-slot.md) promotion items under bounded contracts; clerical queue mutations stay on S0 or the conductor per [B1.1](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md).

Platform workers use the same evidence discipline as product workers—[B2.4](B2.4-verifier-tool-operator-evidence.md) verify where required—but write outcomes to platform queue state and pack fragments, not consumer feature branches.

Product `next_action` remains primary; platform turns dequeue only when [D3.1](D3.1-1-platform-turn-per-k-product-turns.md) schedule and [B4.2](B4.2-platform-promotion-queue-peek-drain.md) peek/drain policy allow, so self-improvement does not starve the active goal.
If S0 platform scripts fail or a worker touches consumer goal scope, the conductor halts the platform turn and routes to H2—never marking promotion items done without verification evidence.

Edge case `B3.4` variant 3: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.

Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.

**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.

acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: B3.4 defines platform turns economy plus s0 scripts for the agent-driven expert system. Cognition & routing — [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)–S4, conductor, workers, dual-stack. In practice, the system on scheduled platform turns per [sec-13](sec-13-pursuit-flow.md) interleaving, the conductor runs s0 scripts first—queue peek, promotion apply, staleness reconcile, manifest validation—before any economy worker interprets platform debt, then economy platform workers from `model-policy.json` execute [b2.6](b2.6-platform-worker-promotion-queue-parallel-slot.md) promotion items under bounded contracts; clerical queue mutations stay on s0 or the conductor per [b1.1](b1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md).
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-b 2026-06-28 -->

Platform turns combine economy workers with S0 scripts: queue peek, promotion apply, staleness reconcile, and manifest validation run deterministically before any model interprets platform debt.

Product turns remain primary; platform turns interleave on schedule ([SEC-13 pursuit flow](SEC-13-pursuit-flow.md)). Platform workers use the same evidence discipline as product workers but write to platform queue state and pack fragments, not consumer feature branches.
